conclusion: At steady state with low noise (σ=0.02), the Allen-Cahn field achieves 0.903 satisfaction rate. The GPU kernel equivalent match rate is 0.878. Spatial correlations decay with distance (correlation length ~ 2-3 lattice spacings), matching the GPU kernel's local constraint propagation. The continuous Allen-Cahn dynamics on the Eisenstein lattice DOES reproduce the discrete GPU kernel behavior at steady state.
